items.title: Clearance pricing returns on Razer’s regularly $100 BlackWidow V3 TKL keyboard with Chroma RGB down at $59 (41% off)
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale on computer accessories, Woot is now offering Razer’s BlackWidow V3 TKL wired gaming keyboard for $58.85 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This keyboard normally sells for around $100 and hasn’t seen many meaningful discounts at Amazon lately, besides a few occasional drops to the $80 mark. It briefly returned to this same $59 low during a similar Woot sale event earlier this year, and today’s offer once again matches the best price we’ve tracked with a solid 41% discount. Be sure to snag it now in case you missed out on the previous offer, and you can find more details below.

items.title: ECOVACS Goat RTK + new LiDAR PRO robot mowers get up to $900 savings to lows starting from $700
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering up to 30% discounts on four ECOVACS robot mowers – three being the newest-generation LiDAR models while one is the previous-gen RTK model – all of them at their lowest or second-lowest prices. One of the returning lows here is on the new ECOVACS Goat O1000 LiDAR PRO Robotic Lawn Mower down at $1,199 shipped. This is one of the latest robots that recently released earlier in the year with a $1,500 MSRP, which we’ve seen two previous discounts to – first to $1,350 at the top of April, and the second to $1,199 that we spotted in late April. Now, that all-time low price is coming back around thanks to the 20% markdown here, saving you $300 and giving you a much more advanced means to automate your lawncare. Head below to learn more and check out all four robot mowers seeing discounts, or browse all the other robot cleaner deals in the brand’s official Amazon storefront here.

items.summary:
LG has unleashed a new range of Windows Copilot+ PCs as part of its gram lineup, and we’re now tracking a notable launch deal on one of them. Over at the brand’s official store, you’ll find the all-new LG gram Book AI 16-inch touchscreen Copilot+ PC currently going for $899.99 shipped. That’s $200 off its listed $1,100 listed price, which LG is offering as a launch deal for folks who want to jump in and snag one early. Best Buy is also matching LG’s price for this notebook with the launch deal, making this a great time to buy it if you were waiting for the new 2026 Windows laptops powered by AMD’s latest Ryzen AI 7 processors. Head below for more details.

Anker 45W Wall Charger 2-pack w/ two USB-C cables

Buy for $23.50 (Reg. $30)

What we love

items.title: Govee launches new Matter-ready Floor Lamp 3 and Lantern Floor Lamp for smarter lighting ambiance starting from $130
items.summary:
Govee is a popular smart lighting brand that tends to have more reasonable pricing, and the brand is launching three new entries into its popular floor lamp series this morning – the Floor Lamp 3 (as well as a Lite variant) and the Lantern Floor Lamp. The former of these two is taking the mantle of Govee’s latest flagship lighting device, with color reproduction powered by LuminBlend+ color management tech, while the former is bringing along a “first-of-its-kind” Halo Gradient lighting experience to a more lantern-focused form factor. There’s also some shared AI-support, as well as Matter support, and automated circadian rhythm scheduling. Head below to get the full rundown on what you can expect.

This model originally launched at $90 and has more recently been selling for around $70 at Amazon. Today’s Best Buy offer takes another $20 off that going rate, bringing it down to a new all-time low at $5 under its previous best price. There still aren’t many Qi2.2-certified 25W wireless power banks on the market, making this one – the first of its kind to hit the scene – one of the most affordable options available in the category. items.title: Huge $1,000 discount strikes Lenovo’s fully-loaded RTX 5090 Legion Pro 7i OLED gaming laptop today (All-time low)
items.summary:
We’re now tracking a deal at B&H that drops Lenovo’s Legion Pro 7i OLED gaming laptop with an RTX 5090 GPU down to $2,999 shipped. While the listing carries a $3,999 sticker price at B&H, configuring the same machine with a Core Ultra 275HX processor, 32GB of RAM, and a 2TB SSD currently comes out to $4,073.27, meaning today’s offer saves you more than $1,074. We’ve previously seen discounts on other Legion Pro 7i configurations featuring RTX 5070 Ti and RTX 5080 graphics, along with even steeper specs like the 64GB RAM model, but this marks the first time this particular RTX 5090 variant has dropped by over $1,000. It’s also a particularly compelling deal in the broader RTX 5090 laptop market, where similarly-equipped machines – and even many RTX 5080 models – still tend to sell for well above the $3,000 mark at Best Buy and other retailers. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: Massive $833 discount knocks LG’s 39-inch UltraGear 240Hz WQHD OLED curved gaming monitor down to $767 (52% off)
items.summary:
Update: This LG UltraGear 39-inch 240Hz WQHD OLED curved gaming monitor has further dropped to $767.51 shipped, marking a new all-time low. More details in the original post below.

Amazon is now offering LG’s UltraGear 39-inch 240Hz WQHD OLED curved gaming monitor for $775.51 shipped. This one typically goes for $1,600, so it’s seeing a massive 51% discount right now. Today’s offer knocks $825 off the usual price and undercuts its previous all-time low by an additional $9, marking the lowest price we’ve tracked for this model so far. It is, in fact, going for $74 less than its 34-inch counterpart right now, making this one of the best times to cash in. This is a great price for a curved OLED panel, so you might want to jump in if you’ve been looking to upgrade your battlestation with a premium display.

items.title: Get up to $700 savings on Segway e-bikes, like the all-terrain Xafari cruiser at its $1,800 low, more from $1,700
items.summary:
Segway is currently offering discounts on two of its e-bikes at their all-time lowest prices, which coincides with the hundreds in savings being offered on a larger lineup of e-scooters. Aside from the newly released MUXI e-bike, which may not be on sale, but does start at the lowest in price, you’ll find the savings starting with the Xafari All-Terrain Cruiser e-bike down at $1,799.99 shipped and coming in a silver or red colorway. It would normally cost you $2,400 at full price, though in 2026 we’ve been seeing constant opportunities to pick it up with this same $600 markdown to the all-time lowest price we have tracked. You can also find the thrill-seeker’s delight, Segway’s Xyber e-bike down at $2,899.99 shipped, which is the all-time low we first saw appear back in February.
